# AXS FEVO Vendor Inputs

Add AXS FEVO reports for Summer Offers ticket sales, package performance, referrals, promo usage, revenue, or fulfillment status.

Example files: ticket-sales-export.csv, package-performance.xlsx, promo-redemptions.csv, revenue-summary.pdf.

Caveats: Confirm event dates, purchase dates, refund handling, package definitions, and whether referral or campaign fields are populated.
